info.DAtuviSezaH: 10.0501 prAtipadikAt DAtvarTe bahulamizWavacca iti gaRasUtreRa atra 'duHKa' iti prAtipadikameva svArTe kriyAM dyotayitum DAtusaMjYAM gfhRAti  ataSca atra DAtvarTaH api 'tatkriyAyAm' iti dIyate
info.english_meaning: to make sad to be sad
